versions.version_description: i found in the other versions some mistakes or there are some that are very diffuclt to understanding

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]

[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D5[/ch]      [ch]Dadd4[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G5[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Emadd9[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
  I will not make the same    mistakes that you    did,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G5[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]Emadd9[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
 I      will not let myself cause my heart so much misery.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Emadd9[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
  I will not break the way    you did, you fell so hard,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]Emadd9[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D5[/ch]
   I've learned the hard   way to never let it get that far...[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
   Because of you I never stray     too far from the sidewalk,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Because of you I learned to play on the safe side so I don't  get hurt,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]G/B[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]B7[/ch]
Because of you I find it hard to trust not only me,  but everyone around me,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Dadd2[/ch]
Because of you,      I am afraid...[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G5[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]Emadd9[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G5[/ch]
   I lose my way, and it's not too long before  you point it out,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Emadd9[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G5[/ch]
I cannot cry, because you know that's weakness in   your eyes;[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Emadd9[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I'm forced to fake, a smile,      a laugh, everyday   of my life[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]Emadd9[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D5[/ch]        [ch]Dsus[/ch]
My heart can't possibly break, when it wasn't even whole to start    with...[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Because of you I never stray     too far from the sidewalk,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Because of you I learned to play on the safe side so I don't  get hurt,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]G/B[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]B7[/ch]
Because of you I find it hard to trust not only me,   but everyone around me,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Dadd4[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Because of you,       I am afraid...[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I watched you die, I heard you cry every night in your  sleep...[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I was so young, you should have known better than to lean on me.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Dsus[/ch]
  You never thought of anyone else, you just saw your pain,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Dsus[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
   and now I cry in the middle of the night, for the same damn thing...[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab]  [ch]D5[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C2[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Because of you I never stray    too far from the sidewalk,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]C2[/ch]                  [ch]D5[/ch]
   because of you I learned to play on the safe side so I don't   get hurt[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Because of you I try my hardest just to forget everything,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
because of you I don't know how to let anyone else   in.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]                  [ch]A/C#[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
Because of you    I'm ashamed of my life because it's empty[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#7[/ch]             [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
  because of you,      I am, afraid...[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Esus[/ch]
Because of you....[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E5[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
Because of you......[/tab]
